walter.name: Dr. Adrian Walter
publicFacts: Chief doctor and medical school founder.
Had the reputation of Rosenfeld's conscience.
Found dead in his home office.
hiddenFacts: Conducted secret psychological experiments on children to suppress fear, guilt, and empathy.
Liam was his most successful experiment.
Wanted to stop the project before his death.

elena.name: Elena Varga
publicFacts: Walter visited her café every day.
Knew him since their student years.
Saw him frightened before his death.
hiddenFacts: Once had a romance with Walter and remained someone he could trust with his most dangerous doubts.
Keeps Walter's note hinting that he "did something irreversible" and feared the consequences.
Saw Liam near Walter's house after midnight.

ernst.name: Ernst Bauer
publicFacts: Worked as a hospital guard for over 20 years.
Thought Walter was "the only normal person here".
Worked night shifts and often saw Walter after the hospital closed.
hiddenFacts: Guarded the locked archive of old experiments, where records about the first child patients were kept.
Hid Walter's night visits with unknown guests to locked rooms for years.
Knows Liam had special access to the school and archive rooms after closing.

clara.name: Clara Weiss
publicFacts: Helped organize Walter's personal documents after his death.
Some residents say she lived in another town for a while.
Supported her brother publicly, but avoids details about their final conversations.
hiddenFacts: Knew Walter conducted unofficial experiments on children at the private clinic.
After Walter's death, hid family archives containing letters about the private clinic and first child patients.
Noticed that the missing files were specifically about Liam and his observation results.

liam.name: Liam Becker
publicFacts: Helps around the medical school with cleaning and paperwork.
Has almost no friends among peers.
Seems calm, but looks deeply affected by Walter's death.
hiddenFacts: Was one of Walter's child patients at the private clinic.
Has abnormally low sensitivity to pain, fear, and guilt because of the experiments.
Met Walter in his house after midnight on the night of his death.

mara.name: Mara Kovács
mara.personality: Cold, strict, logical; controls emotions well
publicFacts: Worked with Walter for over 10 years.
Regularly conducted psychological tests for students.
Wants to preserve the medical school's work.
hiddenFacts: Witnessed Walter's early experiments on children and helped hide them as educational tests.
Has copies of Liam's psychological tests showing abnormally low fear, guilt, and empathy.
Knew Walter wanted to shut down the Liam project and feared the truth would ruin the medical school.
